summary: Classified the live PR inventory shard conservatively. No shared canonical was selected, no close/merge/fix action is safe or allowed, and the four hydrated security-sensitive refs are routed only to central security handling.

actions.reason: Security-sensitive target must be quarantined to central OpenClaw security handling; no close, merge, comment, label, or fix mutation is emitted.
Focused provider model addition should remain open for normal maintainer review; no duplicate/superseded/low-signal evidence.
Focused active draft PR should stay open for maintainer technical review; no close action is allowed or justified.
Real bug-fix-shaped PR with missing proof; keep open rather than close or repair in this no-fix inventory job.
Useful docs PR related to hydrated issue #81310; keep open for maintainer review.
Feature/fix PR has unresolved review findings and author-followup state; keep open, no close or repair path allowed in this job.
Broad active feature PR needs author/maintainer follow-up and technical correctness review; no inventory closeout is safe.
Focused draft PR lacks proof and is not conclusively duplicate or superseded by hydrated open evidence; keep open.
Potential fix for hydrated Perplexity feature gap, but it is draft with conflicting sibling PR #85828 and review/proof state unresolved; keep open.
Small docs PR should remain open for maintainer look; low-signal close is not allowed for this shard.
Open issue remains the related canonical discussion for #81503; no close/post-merge close is allowed or proven.
Security-sensitive target must be routed to central OpenClaw security handling without closing, fixing, or mutating the issue.
Related Perplexity PR with different scope and unresolved review findings; keep open, do not close as duplicate.
Related WebChat work with maintainer signal and unresolved bot review comments; keep open for maintainer path.
